source_title: Q-FIX KNOTLESS All-Suture Anchor - shoulder surgical technique guide
text: transfer suture. 18. Pull on the non-looped end of the transfer sutures to shuttle the repair sutures through both of the implants. NOTE: The transfer sutures will completely disengage from the implants and can be discarded. Remplissage Completion 19. Pull on the two remaining suture strands to tension the repair and pull the posterior soft tissue into the Hill Sachs lesion.
